title: Scale CloudNative-PG to 3 replicas, enable automated backups and WAL archiving
subtasks: Update the CloudNative-PG Cluster CR for sigma1-postgres to set spec.instances: 3.
Configure spec.backup to enable daily scheduled backups and WAL archiving to S3-compatible storage (Cloudflare R2 or S3).
Set backup retention policy (e.g., 7 daily, 4 weekly, 12 monthly).
Verify WAL archiving is enabled and points to the correct S3 bucket.
Test backup and restore process using operator documentation.

title: Enable PgBouncer connection pooling with production tuning
subtasks: Update the PgBouncer Pooler CR to increase spec.instances to 2 for HA.
Tune pooler parameters: increase default_pool_size (e.g., 50), set max_client_conn, and tune timeouts for production load.
Enable metrics endpoint for PgBouncer and ensure ServiceMonitor is scraping it.
Test failover by killing one PgBouncer pod and verifying connections are not interrupted.

title: Enable Valkey (Redis) Sentinel mode with 3 replicas and configure maxmemory policy
subtasks: Update the Valkey CR to enable Sentinel mode with 3 Sentinel pods and 1-3 Valkey replicas (if operator supports).
Set maxmemory policy to 'allkeys-lru' and configure maxmemory to 80% of pod memory limit.
If Sentinel mode is not supported by the operator, document the limitation and mitigation plan.
Test Sentinel failover by killing the primary pod and verifying automatic failover occurs.

title: Configure TLS certificates for all public endpoints using cert-manager
subtasks: Install and configure cert-manager if not already present.
Create ClusterIssuer for Let's Encrypt (or internal CA if required).
Annotate Ingress resources or cloudflared tunnel config to use cert-manager certificates.
Verify all public endpoints serve valid TLS certificates.
Set up certificate renewal monitoring and alerting.

title: Configure NGINX Ingress Controller and Cloudflare CDN for static assets
subtasks: Deploy or update NGINX Ingress Controller with production settings (rate limiting, buffer sizes, timeouts).
Configure Ingress resources for all sigma1 services with proper host/path rules.
Set up Cloudflare CDN for static asset paths (e.g., /images/*) with long cache TTL.
Verify CDN caching headers and cache hit rates for static assets.
Test failover and rollback of Ingress changes.

title: Enforce network policies restricting pod-to-pod traffic
subtasks: Apply default-deny NetworkPolicy in sigma1 and sigma1-db namespaces.
Create allow policies for: sigma1 → sigma1-db (PostgreSQL/Valkey), social-engine → openclaw-nats, ingress controller → sigma1 services, egress to external APIs.
Test connectivity from allowed and denied pods using netcat/curl.
Document all allowed flows and update diagrams.

title: Configure OpenTelemetry Collector and Jaeger with persistent storage
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector with production sampling rates (e.g., 10% or as specified).
Configure exporters to Jaeger and Prometheus.
Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage (e.g., PVC or S3 backend) for trace retention.
Update all service deployments to export traces to the collector endpoint.
Verify traces are collected and persisted for at least 30 days.

title: Configure Prometheus alert rules for SLO violations and critical events
subtasks: Define alert rules for latency, error rate, and availability SLOs for all sigma1 services.
Add alerts for database replication lag, Valkey memory usage, and pod restarts.
Configure AlertManager receivers (PagerDuty, Signal, or email as required).
Test alert firing by simulating SLO violation (e.g., scale down a service).
Document alert runbook and escalation policy.
